title: SXT Validator Dashboard
description: Space and Time (SXT Chain) validator monitoring

panels.title: Best block
panels.description: Latest block produced by the network

panels.title: Finalized
panels.description: Last block confirmed as irreversible by GRANDPA

panels.title: Finality lag
panels.description: Blocks between best and finalized — above 3 needs attention

panels.title: Sync
panels.description: Whether this node is fully synced with the network

panels.title: Runtime spec
panels.description: On-chain runtime version — changes on upgrades

panels.title: Pending ext.
panels.description: Transactions waiting in the mempool to be included

panels.title: Era
panels.description: Current staking era — validators and rewards rotate each era

panels.title: Epoch
panels.description: Current BABE epoch — block producer schedule resets each epoch

panels.title: GRANDPA round
panels.description: Current finality voting round number

panels.title: Era progress
panels.description: How far into the current staking era we are

panels.title: Epoch progress
panels.description: How far into the current BABE epoch we are

panels.title: Block height
panels.description: Best and finalized block height over time

panels.title: SXT / USD
panels.description: Current SXT token price in USD (CoinGecko)

panels.title: 24h change
panels.description: Price change in last 24 hours (%)

panels.title: Market cap
panels.description: SXT token market capitalization (USD)

panels.title: 24h volume
panels.description: SXT 24h trading volume across all exchanges tracked by CoinGecko (CEX + DEX combined)

panels.title: Total stake (USD)
panels.description: Total network stake in USD

panels.title: Network era reward
panels.description: Total reward distributed to ALL validators in last completed era (USD)

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, price_usd FROM sxt.price_history ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Stake distribution
panels.description: Stake distribution across validators (USD)

panels.title: Stake per validator over time
panels.description: Total stake (SXT) per validator over time. Click legend to filter.

panels.title: Era rewards history

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(era) as era, network_reward FROM sxt.v_era_rewards ORDER BY era

panels.description: Total reward distributed to all validators per era (SXT). 1 bar = 1 era = 1 day.

panels.title: Delegation changes

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(era) as era, inflows, outflows, net_change FROM sxt.v_delegation_changes ORDER BY era

panels.description: Delegation stake changes per era. Green = inflows, Red = outflows, Purple = net. 1 bar = 1 era.

panels.title: ★ Total reward generated
panels.description: Total reward generated by your validator in last era (SXT). Split between you and your delegators.

panels.title: ★ APR
panels.description: Estimated annual return for selected validator

panels.title: ★ 84-day commission

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(commission_sxt) as v FROM sxt.v_validator_earnings WHERE validator_name = '${validator}'

panels.description: Commission earned from delegators over last 84 days (SXT)

panels.title: ★ 84-day total earned

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(total_earned_sxt) as v FROM sxt.v_validator_earnings WHERE validator_name = '${validator}'

panels.description: Total operator earnings (commission + own yield) over last 84 days (SXT)

panels.title: ★ Monthly commission

targets.rawSql: SELECT comm_sxt as v FROM sxt.v_validator_monthly WHERE validator_name = '${validator}' ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Commission earned from delegators in current month (SXT)

panels.title: ★ Monthly own yield

targets.rawSql: SELECT yield_sxt as v FROM sxt.v_validator_monthly WHERE validator_name = '${validator}' ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Yield from own staked SXT in current month (SXT)

panels.title: ★ Monthly total

targets.rawSql: SELECT total_sxt as v FROM sxt.v_validator_monthly WHERE validator_name = '${validator}' ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Total operator earnings in current month (SXT)

panels.title: ★ Monthly total (USD)
panels.description: Total operator earnings in current month (USD at current price)

panels.title: Earnings per era

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(era) as era, commission_sxt, own_yield_sxt FROM sxt.v_validator_earnings WHERE validator_name = '${validator}' ORDER BY era

panels.description: Per-era earnings: commission from delegators + yield from own stake. 1 bar = 1 era = 1 day.

panels.title: Monthly earnings

targets.rawSql: SELECT month, comm_sxt, yield_sxt FROM sxt.v_validator_monthly WHERE validator_name = '${validator}' ORDER BY month

panels.description: Monthly totals: commission + own yield (SXT)

panels.title: ★ Total stake over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(era) as era, total_stake FROM sxt.delegation_snapshots WHERE validator_name LIKE '%${validator}%' OR validator_address LIKE '%${validator}%' ORDER BY era

panels.description: Validator total stake (own + delegated) per era.

panels.title: Active validators
panels.description: Validators currently producing blocks and signing commitments

panels.title: Waiting
panels.description: Validators registered but not yet in the active set

panels.title: Nominators
panels.description: Token holders delegating stake to validators

panels.title: Total stake (SXT)
panels.description: Combined SXT staked across all active validators this era

panels.title: Last era reward
panels.description: Total SXT distributed to validators in the previous era

panels.title: Max validators
panels.description: Target number of validators the network elects each era

panels.title: Era reward points
panels.description: Total reward points earned by all validators this era

panels.title: Stake per validator
panels.description: Total stake backing each active validator — higher stake means more network weight

panels.title: Era points per validator
panels.description: Reward points earned this era — proportional to blocks produced and duties fulfilled

panels.title: All validators
panels.description: Full list of active and waiting validators with stake, commission, nominators and era performance

panels.title: Peers
panels.description: Number of nodes directly connected to your validator

panels.title: Peers by role
panels.description: Breakdown of connected peers — Authority (validators) vs Full (non-validating nodes)

panels.title: BABE blocks produced
panels.description: Blocks produced this epoch vs expected average per validator

panels.title: Peers lagging
panels.description: Connected peers more than 5 blocks behind — indicates slow or stalled nodes

panels.title: GRANDPA votes
panels.description: Current prevote and precommit weights in the finality round

panels.title: RPC up
panels.description: Whether the RPC endpoint is responding to queries

panels.title: Peers over time
panels.description: Historical peer count split by role

panels.title: Block proposal time
panels.description: How long your validator takes to build a block — lower is better

panels.title: Network bandwidth
panels.description: Inbound and outbound p2p traffic on the libp2p layer

panels.title: GRANDPA finality rate
panels.description: Rate of prevotes and precommits being cast — indicates finality health

panels.title: Block import time
panels.description: Time to verify and import each block — spikes indicate load or slow storage

panels.title: Gossip messages
panels.description: Network gossip activity — registered vs expired messages

list.name: disk_mount
list.description: Mountpoint for disk usage gauge — override in dashboard settings
